what_was_requested: ETAP 4: Integration & Validation — combine all PROMOTE/WATCHLIST features from stages 1-3 into a single strategy, test with signal ownership analysis, walk-forward validation, and robustness checks
what_was_done: Reviewed research results: cf_vol_term_spread was PROMOTED (+14.3% PnL, Sharpe 1.46, DD 1.68%), cf_funding_extreme and cf_return_skew were REJECT. Cloned baseline active-signal-v1 to candidate_orthogonal_combo_v1. Integrated only cf_vol_term_spread as regime filter (> -0.2) on both signals. Validated signal logic, saved version 2. Ran full-history backtest (run 20260407-195825-2d03834e): $1496.34 PnL, 330 trades, Sharpe 1.456, PF 1.571, WR 50.3%, Max DD 1.68%. Compared vs baseline (run 20260407-194505-36c2a53d): +$187.69 PnL (+14.3%), +0.266 PF, -168 trades (more selective), -$86 DD improvement. Signal ownership analysis (job analysis-995052f67dad): long 50.5% PnL, short 49.5% — clean, no cannibalization. Walk-forward validation queued (job 20260407-200014-5cc20066, 53 cycles). Added to Gold Collection. Recorded integration result (node-67b5c01cda3545dfbb68555e92615247).
